parameters.content:
## ENTRY POINT
Public form URL, org-wide access, no auth.
Users fill in filter fields, submit, get HTML results + CSV download.

Filter semantics:
- Text fields: partial match (contains), case-insensitive
- Dropdowns: exact match (equals)

Form URL: https://YOUR_N8N_HOST/form/YOUR_FORM_UUID

parameters.formDescription: Search the asset inventory. Fill in any combination of fields , leave blank to match all. Refreshed weekday mornings

values.placeholder: e.g. Platform Team, APH, IAG, ExampleCo (partial match)

parameters.content:
## DATA SOURCE
Reads all ~88k rows from asset_catalog.
No filtering at this level ,  filtering happens in the Code node below
for flexibility (partial matches, multi-field combinations).

## FILTER + FORMAT
- Reads form input via $('<Form Trigger node name>')
- Applies contains/equals logic per field
- Builds HTML table (top N results) + embedded CSV download (full set)
- Returns binary HTML file for Form Ending node
- XSS-escaped output

Semantics must match Asset Catalog Query API exactly for consistency.

## RESPONSE
Returns binary HTML file to user's browser.
Downloads with filename based on most-specific active filter.
Workflow is complete ,  Form Trigger + Form Ending form a complete pair.
No Respond to Webhook needed.

# Asset Catalog QUERY FORM

Human-facing query interface for the asset catalog.
Open to anyone in the org, no login, no API key.

Flow: Form input, fetch all rows, JS filter, HTML response + CSV download

Pair workflow: Asset Catalog Query API (same data, JSON output for automations)
Data source: asset_catalog (populated by Asset Catalog Datalake Sync)

Owner: [Owner]
